extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR won Tour de France 2020 by taking yellow from ROGLIČ in Stage 20 time trial, 59 seconds final margin after ceremonial Stage 21.
tactical_patterns: Stage 21 processional format prevents yellow jersey contest by unwritten protocol once peloton reaches Paris city limits.
POGAČAR took three jerseys simultaneously (yellow/white/polka dots), youngest KOM winner in Tour history by defending early gains.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: Won Tour debut at 21, second-youngest ever winner, held polka dots from early stages through final week
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: Lost yellow by 59 seconds in penultimate stage time trial after leading nearly two weeks, unprecedented collapse
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: Reached podium at age 35 in 10th Tour appearance, suggesting older climbers peak later than previously modeled
